basic_details.job_title: NABFINS Customer Service Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: NABARD Financial Services (NABFINS) has published the Customer Service Officer Notification 2026 on the nabfins.org. The recruitment drive aims to fill Customer Service Officer (Field Officer) positions. Candidates with a maximum age of 33 years and having completed PUC/10+2 are eligible to apply via email at the official NABFINS website. The application process will be active until 29 May 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and apply link below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.details: Customer Service Officer (Field Officer): PUC/10+2 completed. Valid driving license and ownership of a two wheeler is mandatory. Candidates must be fluent in the local language. Fresher's are eligible to apply.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NABFINS Customer Service Officer Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 29-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NABFINS Customer Service Officer position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 29th May 2026. It is advisable to send your application well in advance of this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required is PUC/10+2 completed. Candidates must have successfully passed their intermediate or equivalent examination to be eligible for this role.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any age limit for the Customer Service Officer role?
faq.answer: Yes, there is a maximum age limit of 33 years for the Customer Service Officer position. Candidates should ensure they meet this age criterion before applying.

faq.question: Q4. Do I need to have a driving license and a two-wheeler?
faq.answer: Yes, a valid driving license and ownership of a two-wheeler are mandatory requirements for the Customer Service Officer (Field Officer) position. This is essential for field operations.

faq.question: Q5. Is prior work experience necessary to apply?
faq.answer: No, fresher candidates are eligible to apply for the Customer Service Officer position. The eligibility criteria clearly state that freshers can submit their applications.

faq.question: Q6. In which state is this recruitment being conducted?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted in Andhra Pradesh. Specifically, the brief mentions Srikakulam District within Andhra Pradesh.

faq.question: Q7. How should I apply for the Customer Service Officer position?
faq.answer: You need to apply via email. Interested candidates should send their resume to the provided email addresses: [email protected] or [email protected].

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the Customer Service Officer position is Full Time. This means the selected candidates will be expected to work full-time hours.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Based on the provided information, no application fee is mentioned in the official notification. Candidates can proceed with their application without worrying about any fee.

faq.question: Q10. Who is the contact person for inquiries?
faq.answer: The contact person for inquiries is Mr. Madili Bhagirathi. You can reach out to him for any specific questions regarding the application process or the recruitment drive.
